notes.text: 19.30 start, First Session 19.30-21.00, Interval 21.00-21.15, Second Session 21.15-22.45
Delhi Capitals , elected to field first
Lucknow Super Giants Impact Player Subs: Digvesh Rathi, Avesh Khan, Himmat Singh, Shahbaz Ahmed, Akshat Raghuvanshi
Delhi Capitals Impact Player Subs : Ashutosh Sharma, Auqib Nabi, Sameer Rizvi, Dushmantha Chameera, Karun Nair
Lucknow Super Giants: 50 runs in 6.5 overs (41 balls),  Extras 10
Strategic Timeout: Lucknow Super Giants - 65/4 in 8.5 overs (MR Marsh 29)
Over 8.6: Review by Delhi Capitals (Bowling), Decision Challenged - Wicket, Umpire - UV Gandhe, Batter - Abdul Samad (Struck down)
Lucknow Super Giants: 100 runs in 12.4 overs (76 balls),  Extras 14
Lucknow Super Giants impact Player Sub: Shahbaz Ahmed in for Mitchell Marsh (Lucknow Super Giants innings, 13.2 ov)
Strategic Timeout: Lucknow Super Giants - 121/6 in 15.0 overs (Abdul Samad 29, Shahbaz Ahmed 3)
Innings Break: Lucknow Super Giants - 141/10 in 18.4 overs (Shahbaz Ahmed 15)
Over 6.1: Review by Lucknow Super Giants (Bowling), Decision Challenged - Wicket, Umpire - UV Gandhe, Batter - Sameer Rizvi (Struck down)
Delhi Capitals impact Player Sub: Sameer Rizvi in for T Natarajan (Delhi Capitals innings, 3.3 ov)

details.text: Kuldeep's been floating it up, has taken a few big hits... and now he bears fruit! It's slow as ever through the air, and just spins away from the batter and is closer to him than Marsh might have accounted for. It was a googly, too. Marsh's bat twists in his hand and he mistimes this in the air. Stubbs pouches this at mid-off

Kuldeep's been floating it up, has taken a few big hits... and now he bears fruit! It's slow as ever through the air, and just spins away from the batter and is closer to him than Marsh might have accounted for. It was a googly, too. Marsh's bat twists in his hand and he mistimes this in the air. Stubbs pouches this at mid-off

MUKESH IS RUNNING OFF, Tahir-style! What's happened here!? Marsh drills a drive off a good length straight down the pitch. Too straight, in fact, because Mukesh gets a hand on it and the ball ricochets into the stumps. Pant is out of his crease, and what an unfortunate way to be dismissed...

MUKESH IS RUNNING OFF, Tahir-style! What's happened here!? Marsh drills a drive off a good length straight down the pitch. Too straight, in fact, because Mukesh gets a hand on it and the ball ricochets into the stumps. Pant is out of his crease, and what an unfortunate way to be dismissed...

Now THAT'S a comeback! Axar bowls this one quicker, pulls back the length and pushes it to the off stump line. Markram goes for another big swing after opening up his front foot. But the ball rifles through to the stumps and lights up the bails

Now THAT'S a comeback! Axar bowls this one quicker, pulls back the length and pushes it to the off stump line. Markram goes for another big swing after opening up his front foot. But the ball rifles through to the stumps and lights up the bails

Badoni departs without scoring! Natarajan angles this away from the batter after landing it on a length, outside off. Badoni has no idea how to play at that as he just goes for a wild slow, and KL collects behind the stumps

Badoni departs without scoring! Natarajan angles this away from the batter after landing it on a length, outside off. Badoni has no idea how to play at that as he just goes for a wild slow, and KL collects behind the stumps

That's almost vintage Bravo, but somehow better! Ball of the tournament so far, really. Pooran goes on the front foot, trying to play this full ball down into the off-side. But Ngidi has disguised his off-cutter to perfection. It floats through the air, impossibly slow, and somehow, sneaks past Pooran's bat and rattles his stumps. Magical T20 bowling, this

That's almost vintage Bravo, but somehow better! Ball of the tournament so far, really. Pooran goes on the front foot, trying to play this full ball down into the off-side. But Ngidi has disguised his off-cutter to perfection. It floats through the air, impossibly slow, and somehow, sneaks past Pooran's bat and rattles his stumps. Magical T20 bowling, this

That rockets... straight to Miller at long-off! That was travelling at pace, very flat, Miller must've been taken aback. He was a few feet in the ropes, was leaning back as the ball came, then took it reverse-cupped. Took a step or two back as he got carried by the momentum. Was a slot ball in the hitting range, Samad drove it hard with a full follow-through

That rockets... straight to Miller at long-off! That was travelling at pace, very flat, Miller must've been taken aback. He was a few feet in the ropes, was leaning back as the ball came, then took it reverse-cupped. Took a step or two back as he got carried by the momentum. Was a slot ball in the hitting range, Samad drove it hard with a full follow-through

Leading edge lollipops back to the bowler 87ks stock ball on a fullish length, Choudhary got his weight forward and tried to nudge it to the leg side. Closed the bat-face too early. Kuldeep didn't have to move much

Leading edge lollipops back to the bowler 87ks stock ball on a fullish length, Choudhary got his weight forward and tried to nudge it to the leg side. Closed the bat-face too early. Kuldeep didn't have to move much
Right up, taken at cover point. Low full toss swerving away towards the base of off stump. Shami cleared the front leg and looked to go over cover. Got it off the bottom of the bat
Right up, taken at cover point. Low full toss swerving away towards the base of off stump. Shami cleared the front leg and looked to go over cover. Got it off the bottom of the bat

Nortje's into the shot too early, goes through with it. Long-off takes it. Pitched right up, just outside off. Nortje wound up big, took a small, straight stride and tried to munch a lofted drive down the ground.

Nortje's into the shot too early, goes through with it. Long-off takes it. Pitched right up, just outside off. Nortje wound up big, took a small, straight stride and tried to munch a lofted drive down the ground.

Another slower ball... ends the innings! Very full, just outside off. Mohsin clears the front leg and tries to jam it into the ground. Gets an edge that floats to short third. All smiles and high-fives among Ngidi and Axar

Another slower ball... ends the innings! Very full, just outside off. Mohsin clears the front leg and tries to jam it into the ground. Gets an edge that floats to short third. All smiles and high-fives among Ngidi and Axar
Gone straight away! Shami pitches this full, outside off. Rahul goes for an extravagant inside-out cover drive, but mistimes it straight to deep point

outDetails.shortText: c Mohsin Khan b Mohammed Shami

details.text: Gone straight away! Shami pitches this full, outside off. Rahul goes for an extravagant inside-out cover drive, but mistimes it straight to deep point

outDetails.shortText: c Mohsin Khan b Mohammed Shami

details.text: Straight up and Pant collects this one! Was on a length, just outside off. Nissanka never looked comfortable out there. Slogs this high in the air, behind him, and Pant dives in the end to complete the catch

Straight up and Pant collects this one! Was on a length, just outside off. Nissanka never looked comfortable out there. Slogs this high in the air, behind him, and Pant dives in the end to complete the catch

Samad gets it on second try! Rana tries to glide this laaaateee. The ball was on a length, seaming away. Took the edge off his shot - still, what was he thinking trying to play it late with first slip right there? Samad goes for it, ball bounces in the air, then he pouches it safely

outDetails.shortText: c Abdul Samad b Mohsin Khan

details.text: Samad gets it on second try! Rana tries to glide this laaaateee. The ball was on a length, seaming away. Took the edge off his shot - still, what was he thinking trying to play it late with first slip right there? Samad goes for it, ball bounces in the air, then he pouches it safely

outDetails.shortText: c Abdul Samad b Mohsin Khan

details.text: WHAT A BALL! Timbersssss. Prince Yadav bangs this in on a length, swings back into Axar. 138.3 kph, but felt more like 148.3 off the pitch. Axar tried to flick this and is in disbelief as he turns around and sees his stumps splattered. Whaddaball

WHAT A BALL! Timbersssss. Prince Yadav bangs this in on a length, swings back into Axar. 138.3 kph, but felt more like 148.3 off the pitch. Axar tried to flick this and is in disbelief as he turns around and sees his stumps splattered. Whaddaball

details.text: Samad gets it on second try! Rana tries to glide this laaaateee. The ball was on a length, seaming away. Took the edge off his shot - still, what was he thinking trying to play it late with first slip right there? Samad goes for it, ball bounces in the air, then he pouches it safely

wicket.shortText: c Abdul Samad b Mohsin Khan

details.text: Straight up and Pant collects this one! Was on a length, just outside off. Nissanka never looked comfortable out there. Slogs this high in the air, behind him, and Pant dives in the end to complete the catch

WHAT A BALL! Timbersssss. Prince Yadav bangs this in on a length, swings back into Axar. 138.3 kph, but felt more like 148.3 off the pitch. Axar tried to flick this and is in disbelief as he turns around and sees his stumps splattered. Whaddaball

25010.preText: We are out of the Endless Over. One left in the powerplay. Let's see if Delhi Capitals can get some momentum back in their innings.
25010.postText:
Craig: "How about an "Impact commentator" to jinx the whole game." - Our rotas would go completely off kilter I'm afraid...

Rahul Sargam : "Rattled. You know what? I've been a huge Dale Steyn fan, and whenever a fast bowler hits the timber and celebrates the wicket the way Prince just did, it reminds me of my idol. Love those celebrations."
25010.shortText: Mohsin Khan to Sameer Rizvi, no run

25020.text: Same delivery: outside off, on a length, and driven to the covers
25020.shortText: Mohsin Khan to Sameer Rizvi, no run

25030.preText: rohan : "@chris With where the match is is currently placed, I will take that as a 'w'"
25030.text: Rizvi tries to play this late, but still can't get off the mark. Outside off, still getting vicious swing off it, and he glides this straight towards backward point
25030.shortText: Mohsin Khan to Sameer Rizvi, no run

25040.text: Awkward flash at the ball as he tries to swipe across the line from in front of his chest. Short-ish, but slows down, and thuds into him instead of producing any runs
25040.shortText: Mohsin Khan to Sameer Rizvi, 1 leg bye

25050.preText: sovan tarafder: "aren't u scared of AI commentator?" - Would AI ever publish your comment?
25050.text: On a length, right on the line of the stumps, Stubbs is happy to just defend once more
25050.postText: Prisha: "How about an impact toss? India would certainly like that" - They'd lose that too, given their recent history with tosses
25050.shortText: Mohsin Khan to Stubbs, no run

25060.text: Shorter now, rising at Stubbs outside off. Stubbs flicks this towards deep fine leg and sets off for the other end
25060.postText: V S SRINIVASAN : "To me right now DC =Defeat Certain." - Simple and elegant. I like it.

26010.preText: KumarS: "CSK fans relieved that they are not the only with batting blues. "
26010.text: Rizvi's agony continues. He tries to change his fortunes by stepping down the pitch and swinging through the line. The ball is on a length on the stumps, and it just whizzes past him. Appeals around the pitch, umpire says not out. We have ourselves a review. Big gap between bat and ball, it seems. Rizvi's now seven balls without a run on the board...
26010.shortText: Mohammed Shami to Sameer Rizvi, no run

26020.preText: Omar : "I'll do a better one, An Impact umpire, gives decisions in favour of the team using it, for I guess 3-4 overs and then back to normal umpires" - Gully cricket rules!
26020.text: And he's finally off the mark! On a length, right outside off, he plays it towards mid-off and runs over to the other end. Finally!
26020.postText: Craig: "We already have AI commentators, that is commentators with Actual Intelligence. " - Indeed. Will AI ever be as susceptible to flattery as a human one like me?
26020.shortText: Mohammed Shami to Sameer Rizvi, 1 run

26030.text: Well outside off. Stubbs plays this inside-out drive late, towards deep point

26040.text: On a length and tailing into the batter. Flicks this from near his chest, towards square leg
26040.shortText: Mohammed Shami to Sameer Rizvi, 1 run

26050.preText: Anand Subramani: "Awarding bonus points for wins with certain number of runs or overs or wickets will act as a incentive for the teams" - The model of the IPL might depend on keeping it close, though. Like the mega auctions split up the teams too.
26050.text: French cut. On a good length, rising at him as he tries to drive it. Ball dribbles down to backward square leg, lying vacant, as they sneak in a run
26050.postText: Harshit Goyal: "Amid all the innovations, glitz and enhanced statistics and what not, I still can't get over the fact that the richest and the most competitive T20 league doesn't offer its viewers a more pleasing set of jerseys and color combinations! It's bizarre and outright foolish to get confused between which dugout/team you're looking at in a split second." - I keep forgetting which team's which

26060.preText: Dhaval : "Will we have a first this IPL? Chasing team loses?"
26060.text: Another wide, how we'd missed those! Goes for another bouncer, but the batter jumps for it and still can't reach it
26060.shortText: Mohammed Shami to Sameer Rizvi, 1 wide

26070.text: Fuller now, outside off. An energetic cut gets it down to point. They do well to save the extra run, not so well to throw in a wayward ball. They sneak in a second run. Not good fielding, in the end
26070.shortText: Mohammed Shami to Sameer Rizvi, 2 runs

27010.preText:
Mitan: "@Abhijato, publish your pic with three fingers in front of your face to prove you are not AI commentator !!! :)" - Weirdest captcha test of all time.

Prisha: "We also have Al(agappan Muthu)" - our Slack chats have often been confused about Al vs AI. Can you tell the difference?
27010.text: Too wide, back of a length. Stubbs easily threads this through to the deep cover region
27010.postText: "I just logged on to watch the match live. Did Athletico Madrid acquire LSG?" - Droll, Archie, quite droll

27020.text: Full and swinging back into the pads of Rizvi. An attempt at a flick never goes anywhere
27020.postText: Jai: "@Harshit Goyal, I always felt BBL has the best jerseys. No confusion what so ever..."
27020.shortText: Nortje to Sameer Rizvi, no run

27030.text: W-i-d-e. Wide. It was a wide. Drifts away from the batter looking to hook this short ball, down leg. Wide.

27040.text: Good ball, on a length and just outside off. Rizvi does well to glide this quite late, towards deep backward point

header.title: DC 43/4  (7.3 ov, Tristan Stubbs 9*, Sameer Rizvi 5*, Anrich Nortje 0/5) - Live
